titleStmt.title: 204. Information Memorandum From the President’s Special Assistant (Rostow) to President ) to President Johnson

div.head: 204. Information Memorandum From the President’s Special Assistant (Rostow) to President Johnson Source: Johnson Library, National Security File, Country File, Jordan, Vol. V, Memos, 9/68–1/69. Secret; Sensitive; Eyes Only. A handwritten notation indicates that the memorandum was received at 1:20 p.m.
div.p: A good deal hinges on Nasser’s discussions in Moscow next week.
